examples: There was a better name, a Latin name, for it was also called Accidie, and it meant intellectual and spiritual torpor, indifference, and lethargy.
There was a better name, a Latin name, for it; it was also called ACCIDIE, and it meant intellectual and spiritual torpor, indifference, and lethargy.
During the 6 w to 8 w, the model rats appeared in lethargy with narrowed eyes, accidie, loss of hair, increased drinking volume, dejecta desiccation, sweatiness and wateriness at tail.
